title: Copy board with integration

posts.author: RobvanHees (Rob van Hees)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a main board, with an automation to create another board with a status change.
He creates this other board via a board template that I made.

However, now it appears that he does not include the integrations and automations associated with this board?

Is there anything you can do about this?

posts.author: ErickE-monday.com (Erick E.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RobvanHees!

Integrations will not carry over when you duplicate or copy a board and this also applies to some automations.

Generally:

  • Automation recipes that include mapping will not duplicate
  • Cross-board automation recipes will not duplicate
  • Custom recipes will not duplicate, but this may come soon
  • Integrations will not duplicate

At the moment there is no workaround to this, but it is something that our developers can consider as they make improvements in the future.
